ksa_text: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and technology choices that support data governance and analytical objectives.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of complex data structure capabilities and applications

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI capabilities, targeted usage, goals, and expected benefits and costs compared with appropriate benchmarks are understood.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-001 (DA, Task) maps to BI Developer scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4452 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within business intelligence development and analytics engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4452 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DA-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4452, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
